properties.name: icap.enabled
properties.description: Whether the ICAP client auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: icap.host
properties.description: Hostname or IP address of the ICAP server.

properties.name: icap.port
properties.description: TCP port of the ICAP server (IANA default is 1344).

properties.name: icap.service
properties.description: Default ICAP service path/name to target (e.g. 'avscan').

properties.name: icap.allow-204
properties.description: Advertise 'Allow: 204' so the server may answer '204 No Content' when no modification is needed.

properties.name: icap.ssl.enabled
properties.description: Connect using TLS (ICAPS) instead of plain TCP.

properties.name: icap.ssl.bundle
properties.description: Name of a Spring SSL bundle (spring.ssl.bundle.*) supplying the key/trust material for TLS. When unset, the JVM default SSL context is used.

properties.name: icap.preview.enabled
properties.description: Use the ICAP Preview mechanism when a body is present.

properties.name: icap.preview.size
properties.description: Number of leading body bytes to send as the preview.
